description: 3x Floral Candle - Jasmine / Magnolia / Gardenia / Mix - 3oz Enhance the ambiance of your living space with this set of three scented candles from Floral. The candles are a perfect mix of Jasmine, Magnolia, and Gardenia fragrances that add a touch of elegance to your home décor. Each candle weighs 3oz and is designed to fill any room with a pleasant aroma. These candles are perfect for anyone who loves to relax with a soothing scent. The set is ideal for use in any room of your home, from the living room to the bedroom. The candles are made by Floral, a trusted brand known for their quality products. Bring the fragrance of nature into your home with this set of Floral candles. Scents: Jasmine, Magnolia, Gardenia.
